sentences.arabic: كَانَ صَيَّادٌ اسْمُهُ رَاشِدٌ يَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْبَحْرِ كُلَّ فَجْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio je ribar po imenu Rašid koji je svaki zoru odlazio na more.
sentences.translationEn: There was a fisherman named Rashid who went to the sea every dawn.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ لَا يَأْخُذُ مِنَ السَّمَكِ إِلَّا مَا يَحْتَاجُ.
sentences.translation: Uzimao je od ribe samo onoliko koliko mu je trebalo.
sentences.translationEn: He only took from the fish what he needed.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لِابْنِهِ: «الْبَحْرُ يُعْطِينَا فَيَجِبُ أَنْ نَحْتَرِمَهُ».
sentences.translation: Rekao je svom sinu: «More nam daje pa moramo ga poštovati».
sentences.translationEn: He said to his son: «The sea gives to us so we must respect it».

sentences.arabic: بَقِيَ الْبَحْرُ غَنِيًّا بِالسَّمَكِ وَرَاشِدٌ يَعِيشُ بِرَاحَةٍ.
sentences.translation: More je ostalo bogato ribom a Rašid je živio mirno.
sentences.translationEn: The sea remained rich with fish and Rashid lived peacefully.
